```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement database index management and optimization"
---
# Index Management
## Task
Manage and optimize database indexes.
## Requirements
1. Analyze query patterns for index needs. 2. Remove unused indexes.
3. Implement composite indexes for multi-column queries. 4. Monitor index bloat.
5. Schedule index maintenance (rebuild/reorg).
## Constraints
- Every index slows writes. Profile before adding. Remove unused indexes. Maintain regularly.
## Success Criteria
- Indexes match query patterns. Unused removed. Bloat managed. Maintenance scheduled.
```
